Testimonials.benefitsTitle: What Your Fortune Book Can Illuminate
Testimonials.benefitsDesc: Every fortune book is a deep journey into your own life. Here are the four core questions your book most often answers.
Testimonials.booksTitle: Choose the Right Fortune Book for You
Testimonials.booksDesc: Each book has a different focus — choose the depth of analysis that suits your needs.
Testimonials.ctaPrompt: Ready to explore your birth chart in depth?

benefits.title: Career & Talents
benefits.question: Which industry suits me? When is my career turning point?
benefits.insight: The fortune book identifies your innate talent direction from your birth chart, pinpoints career peaks and transition timing so every decision has a foundation.

benefits.title: Romance & Marriage
benefits.question: When will love arrive? What are the hidden marriage challenges?
benefits.insight: Cross-validated through BaZi (Four Pillars) and Zi Wei Dou Shu, we assess relationship timing, compatibility traits, and areas that need cultivation — not vague fortune telling.

benefits.title: Wealth & Timing
benefits.question: What type of wealth luck do I have? When to invest or consolidate?
benefits.insight: We distinguish innate versus luck-based wealth, identifying the key annual turning points in your financial cycle to help you make the right financial moves at the right time.

benefits.title: Annual Forecast & Decisions
benefits.question: Is this year good to change jobs? When is the best time for major decisions?
benefits.insight: The annual fortune book provides month-by-month analysis so you can anticipate each month's energy flow and act at the most favorable moments.

FAQ.sectionDesc: Have questions? Here you'll find all the answers you need.
FAQ.contactPrompt: Feel free to contact the Yudongzi Academy support team — we're happy to help.

items.question: How long does a chart analysis take?
items.answer: The system uses real-time computation. Your complete fortune book report is ready within seconds of submission — no waiting required.

items.question: How do I pay?
items.answer: We currently accept online credit card payments via ECPay. Transactions are securely handled by ECPay. We never store any credit card information.

items.question: How long can I keep the report?
items.answer: Once downloaded, the report is yours permanently to view, print, or share at any time. Please download and save your report after receiving it — the system does not provide backup retrieval within your account.

items.question: What should I know before purchasing?
items.answer: This service delivers a digital divination report. Once generated, refunds are not available. Please make sure you understand the service before ordering. For any questions, feel free to contact us via online consultation first.

items.question: How accurate is the chart analysis?
items.answer: Divination, like the I Ching, is a classic life guide that helps people move toward a fulfilling life. It offers life guidance and decision-making reference rather than 100% fate prediction. Accuracy varies by individual.

items.question: How can I learn more about the services?
items.answer: You're welcome to contact us via online consultation first. Tell us your needs in detail, and Yudongzi will explain the most suitable plan for you before you place an order.

items.question: Will my personal data be shared?
items.answer: Absolutely not. Your birth data and fortune book report are completely private and for your use only. We strictly protect user privacy.

FinalCTA.headline: Ready to Begin Your Divination Journey?
FinalCTA.body: Generate your personal birth chart now and receive tailored life guidance. Explore your talents and seize the opportunities your destiny holds.
FinalCTA.bottomText: Join 5000+ Yudongzi Academy users and transform your perspective on life.
FinalCTA.bottomText2: Your birth chart is waiting for you.
